<a id="class-curve"></a>

# Curve

**Inherits:** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A mathematical curve.

## Description

This resource describes a mathematical curve by defining a set of points and tangents at each point. By default, it ranges between `0` and `1` on the X and Y axes, but these ranges can be changed.

Please note that many resources and nodes assume they are given *unit curves*. A unit curve is a curve whose domain (the X axis) is between `0` and `1`. Some examples of unit curve usage are [CPUParticles2D.angle_curve](class_cpuparticles2d.md#class-cpuparticles2d-property-angle-curve) and [Line2D.width_curve](class_line2d.md#class-line2d-property-width-curve).

## Signals

<a id="class-curve-signal-domain-changed"></a>

**domain_changed**() [🔗](#class-curve-signal-domain-changed)

Emitted when [max_domain](#class-curve-property-max-domain) or [min_domain](#class-curve-property-min-domain) is changed.

---

<a id="class-curve-signal-range-changed"></a>

**range_changed**() [🔗](#class-curve-signal-range-changed)

Emitted when [max_value](#class-curve-property-max-value) or [min_value](#class-curve-property-min-value) is changed.

---

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-curve-tangentmode"></a>

enum **TangentMode**: [🔗](#enum-curve-tangentmode)

<a id="class-curve-constant-tangent-free"></a>

[TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) **TANGENT_FREE** = `0`

The tangent on this side of the point is user-defined.

<a id="class-curve-constant-tangent-linear"></a>

[TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) **TANGENT_LINEAR** = `1`

The curve calculates the tangent on this side of the point as the slope halfway towards the adjacent point.

<a id="class-curve-constant-tangent-mode-count"></a>

[TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) **TANGENT_MODE_COUNT** = `2`

The total number of available tangent modes.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-curve-property-bake-resolution"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **bake_resolution** = `100` [🔗](#class-curve-property-bake-resolution)

-  **set_bake_resolution**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_bake_resolution**()

The number of points to include in the baked (i.e. cached) curve data.

---

<a id="class-curve-property-max-domain"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **max_domain** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-curve-property-max-domain)

-  **set_max_domain**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_max_domain**()

The maximum domain (x-coordinate) that points can have.

---

<a id="class-curve-property-max-value"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **max_value** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-curve-property-max-value)

-  **set_max_value**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_max_value**()

The maximum value (y-coordinate) that points can have. Tangents can cause higher values between points.

---

<a id="class-curve-property-min-domain"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **min_domain** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-curve-property-min-domain)

-  **set_min_domain**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_min_domain**()

The minimum domain (x-coordinate) that points can have.

---

<a id="class-curve-property-min-value"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **min_value** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-curve-property-min-value)

-  **set_min_value**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_min_value**()

The minimum value (y-coordinate) that points can have. Tangents can cause lower values between points.

---

<a id="class-curve-property-point-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **point_count** = `0` [🔗](#class-curve-property-point-count)

-  **set_point_count**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_point_count**()

The number of points describing the curve.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-curve-method-add-point"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **add_point**(position: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), left_tangent: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0, right_tangent: [float](class_float.md#class-float) = 0, left_mode: [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) = 0, right_mode: [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) = 0) [🔗](#class-curve-method-add-point)

Adds a point to the curve. For each side, if the `*_mode` is [TANGENT_LINEAR](#class-curve-constant-tangent-linear), the `*_tangent` angle (in degrees) uses the slope of the curve halfway to the adjacent point. Allows custom assignments to the `*_tangent` angle if `*_mode` is set to [TANGENT_FREE](#class-curve-constant-tangent-free).

---

<a id="class-curve-method-bake"></a>

 **bake**() [🔗](#class-curve-method-bake)

Recomputes the baked cache of points for the curve.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-clean-dupes"></a>

 **clean_dupes**() [🔗](#class-curve-method-clean-dupes)

Removes duplicate points, i.e. points that are less than 0.00001 units (engine epsilon value) away from their neighbor on the curve.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-clear-points"></a>

 **clear_points**() [🔗](#class-curve-method-clear-points)

Removes all points from the curve.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-domain-range"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_domain_range**()  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-domain-range)

Returns the difference between [min_domain](#class-curve-property-min-domain) and [max_domain](#class-curve-property-max-domain).

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-point-left-mode"></a>

[TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) **get_point_left_mode**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-point-left-mode)

Returns the left [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) for the point at `index`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-point-left-tangent"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_point_left_tangent**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-point-left-tangent)

Returns the left tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at `index`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-point-position"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_point_position**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-point-position)

Returns the curve coordinates for the point at `index`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-point-right-mode"></a>

[TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) **get_point_right_mode**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-point-right-mode)

Returns the right [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) for the point at `index`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-point-right-tangent"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_point_right_tangent**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-point-right-tangent)

Returns the right tangent angle (in degrees) for the point at `index`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-get-value-range"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_value_range**()  [🔗](#class-curve-method-get-value-range)

Returns the difference between [min_value](#class-curve-property-min-value) and [max_value](#class-curve-property-max-value).

---

<a id="class-curve-method-remove-point"></a>

 **remove_point**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-remove-point)

Removes the point at `index` from the curve.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-sample"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **sample**(offset: [float](class_float.md#class-float))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-sample)

Returns the Y value for the point that would exist at the X position `offset` along the curve.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-sample-baked"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **sample_baked**(offset: [float](class_float.md#class-float))  [🔗](#class-curve-method-sample-baked)

Returns the Y value for the point that would exist at the X position `offset` along the curve using the baked cache. Bakes the curve's points if not already baked.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-left-mode"></a>

 **set_point_left_mode**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), mode: [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-left-mode)

Sets the left [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) for the point at `index` to `mode`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-left-tangent"></a>

 **set_point_left_tangent**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), tangent: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-left-tangent)

Sets the left tangent angle for the point at `index` to `tangent`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-offset"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **set_point_offset**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), offset: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-offset)

Sets the offset from `0.5`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-right-mode"></a>

 **set_point_right_mode**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), mode: [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-right-mode)

Sets the right [TangentMode](#enum-curve-tangentmode) for the point at `index` to `mode`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-right-tangent"></a>

 **set_point_right_tangent**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), tangent: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-right-tangent)

Sets the right tangent angle for the point at `index` to `tangent`.

---

<a id="class-curve-method-set-point-value"></a>

 **set_point_value**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int), y: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-curve-method-set-point-value)

Assigns the vertical position `y` to the point at `index`.
